package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for db_pool_limits_not_configured_at_boot: Bootstrap code that opens long-lived DB clients without visible pool sizing or lifetime limits.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario375Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
